item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 1min "The current situation is raising serious questions"
Supporter of affordability checks
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 1min "The current situation is raising serious questions"
Supporter of affordability checks urges government to pause their introduction De racingpost.com 271

item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 28min “Constitution Hill is a superstar of a horse, but like Al Aasy he’s also nine years old
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 28min “Constitution Hill is a superstar of a horse, but like Al Aasy he’s also nine years old”
Al Aasy, Convergent and Pride Of Arras are among the high-class opposition facing the former Champion Hurdle star at @NewburyRacing on Saturday... De attheraces.com 1 3 9 3 mil

item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 31min "I think it'll be the first of many"
Dan Skelton praised by fellow trainers after secu
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 31min "I think it'll be the first of many"
Dan Skelton praised by fellow trainers after securing maiden championship De racingpost.com 1 2 mil
